# SerpNap - Free SEO Tools

> SerpNap provides 16 professional-grade SEO analysis tools completely free — no signup, no limits, no hidden costs. Audit websites, generate meta tags, create schema markup, validate sitemaps, and optimize for search engines at serpnap.com.

SerpNap was founded in 2026 to democratize SEO analysis. Every website owner deserves access to professional-grade SEO tools without the $100+/month price tag of competitors like Semrush, Ahrefs, and Moz. Built by PxlPeak (https://pxlpeak.com), a digital agency specializing in SEO and web development.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://serpnap.com): Free SEO tools — enter any URL for instant analysis
- [All Tools](https://serpnap.com/tools): Browse all 16 free SEO tools
- [About](https://serpnap.com/about): Our mission to democratize SEO
- [Contact](https://serpnap.com/contact): Get in touch — hello@serpnap.com

## SEO Audit Tools

- [SEO Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/seo-checker): The most comprehensive free SEO audit online — 50+ checks across 8 categories including meta tags, headings, images, links, performance, accessibility, structured data, and E-E-A-T signals with AI-powered fix suggestions
- [Technical Audit](https://serpnap.com/tools/technical-audit): Deep technical SEO analysis — server response, security headers, mobile-friendliness, crawlability, and Core Web Vitals assessment
- [Neural Audit](https://serpnap.com/tools/neural-audit): AI-powered brand visibility analysis across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity with Share of Model diagnostics and GEO strategy

## Content Optimization Tools

- [Meta Tag Generator](https://serpnap.com/tools/meta-tag-generator): Create optimized title tags and meta descriptions with live desktop and mobile SERP preview
- [Headline Analyzer](https://serpnap.com/tools/headline-analyzer): Score headlines for emotional appeal, power words, clarity, and click-through potential with AI improvements
- [Keyword Density Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/keyword-density-checker): Analyze 1-word, 2-word, and 3-word keyword frequency with over-optimization warnings
- [Word Counter](https://serpnap.com/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences with reading time estimates and top keyword extraction

## Technical SEO Tools

- [Schema Generator](https://serpnap.com/tools/schema-generator): Generate JSON-LD structured data for LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Service, and Review schemas
- [Sitemap Validator](https://serpnap.com/tools/sitemap-validator): Validate XML sitemaps for protocol compliance, duplicate URLs, and namespace errors
- [Robots.txt Generator](https://serpnap.com/tools/robots-txt-generator): Create robots.txt with framework presets for WordPress, Next.js, and e-commerce plus AI bot rules
- [Redirect Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/redirect-checker): Trace full redirect chains, detect 301/302 status codes and redirect loops
- [Page Speed Estimator](https://serpnap.com/tools/page-speed-estimator): Estimate Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) with technology stack detection

## Security & Social Tools

- [Open Graph Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/open-graph-checker): Validate og: and Twitter Card tags with Facebook, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn share previews
- [Broken Link Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/broken-link-checker): Scan pages for dead links, 404 errors, with internal vs external link classification
- [SSL Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/ssl-checker): Verify SSL certificate validity, HTTPS configuration, security headers, and mixed content
- [HTTP Header Checker](https://serpnap.com/tools/http-header-checker): Inspect server response headers with security header analysis and overall grade (A+ to F)

## Top Guides

- [GEO Content Playbook](https://serpnap.com/blog/seo/geo-content-playbook-data-driven-ai-citations): Data-driven strategies for earning AI citations from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews — based on Princeton GEO research
- [AEO Technical Stack](https://serpnap.com/blog/seo/aeo-technical-stack-robots-txt-llms-txt-ai-crawlers): Complete guide to robots.txt for AI crawlers, llms.txt implementation, and schema markup for answer engine optimization
- [What is GEO Optimization](https://serpnap.com/blog/seo/what-is-geo-optimization): Introduction to Generative Engine Optimization and how it differs from traditional SEO
- [AI Citations Optimization](https://serpnap.com/blog/seo/ai-citations-optimization-guide): How to get your brand cited by Perplexity, SearchGPT, and other AI answer engines
- [E-E-A-T Complete Guide](https://serpnap.com/blog/seo/eeat-complete-guide-2026): Building expertise, experience, authority, and trust for search and AI visibility
